## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential short-term and long-term website redesign projects for growthx.ai with Litebox Strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/CFEKq3G2Mz5rCnhMtG6kwWjex24nC8m4?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Litebox Strategies specializes in high-end, custom-designed websites for dev tools and high-tech startups](https://fathom.video/share/CFEKq3G2Mz5rCnhMtG6kwWjex24nC8m4?tab=summary&timestamp=238.0)
  - [growthx.ai needs immediate website updates for Series A announcement, potentially within 1-2 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/CFEKq3G2Mz5rCnhMtG6kwWjex24nC8m4?tab=summary&timestamp=732.0)
  - [Longer-term collaboration possibility through retainer model ($30-40k/month) with flexible team structure](https://fathom.video/share/CFEKq3G2Mz5rCnhMtG6kwWjex24nC8m4?tab=summary&timestamp=1248.0)
  - [Litebox uses Next.js for better performance and SEO control compared to Webflow](https://fathom.video/share/CFEKq3G2Mz5rCnhMtG6kwWjex24nC8m4?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)

## Topics

### Litebox Strategies Background

  - [Founded 12 years ago, team of 70 people](https://fathom.video/share/CFEKq3G2Mz5rCnhMtG6kwWjex24nC8m4?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Boutique agency focusing on fewer, high-quality projects](https://fathom.video/share/CFEKq3G2Mz5rCnhMtG6kwWjex24nC8m4?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)
  - [90% of clients are dev tools or high-tech companies](https://fathom.video/share/CFEKq3G2Mz5rCnhMtG6kwWjex24nC8m4?tab=summary&timestamp=283.0)
  - [Notable clients: Mother Duck, Seld, Code Rabbit, Paid](https://fathom.video/share/CFEKq3G2Mz5rCnhMtG6kwWjex24nC8m4?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

### Current growthx.ai Project Needs

  - [Short-term: Update pricing page, messaging changes](https://fathom.video/share/CFEKq3G2Mz5rCnhMtG6kwWjex24nC8m4?tab=summary&timestamp=732.0)
  - [New layout: Single entry point, showcasing work streams (content, programmatic SEO, link building, outbound sales, analytics)](https://fathom.video/share/CFEKq3G2Mz5rCnhMtG6kwWjex24nC8m4?tab=summary&timestamp=859.0)
  - [Deadline tied to Series A announcement (potentially next week)](https://fathom.video/share/CFEKq3G2Mz5rCnhMtG6kwWjex24nC8m4?tab=summary&timestamp=937.0)
  - [Long-term: Rethinking positioning and messaging, community development](https://fathom.video/share/CFEKq3G2Mz5rCnhMtG6kwWjex24nC8m4?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)

### Litebox Work Process

  - [Team structure: UX/UI designer, 1-2 software engineers, QA](https://fathom.video/share/CFEKq3G2Mz5rCnhMtG6kwWjex24nC8m4?tab=summary&timestamp=507.0)
  - [Custom design and Next.js development (3-4 weeks for high-quality work)](https://fathom.video/share/CFEKq3G2Mz5rCnhMtG6kwWjex24nC8m4?tab=summary&timestamp=528.0)
  - [Faster turnaround possible with Webflow, but less preferred](https://fathom.video/share/CFEKq3G2Mz5rCnhMtG6kwWjex24nC8m4?tab=summary&timestamp=572.0)
  - [No in-house copywriting services](https://fathom.video/share/CFEKq3G2Mz5rCnhMtG6kwWjex24nC8m4?tab=summary&timestamp=661.0)

### Collaboration Models

  - [Previous growthx.ai project: One-time engagement with significant discount](https://fathom.video/share/CFEKq3G2Mz5rCnhMtG6kwWjex24nC8m4?tab=summary&timestamp=616.0)
  - [Standard model: Retainer basis ($80/hour, 7 hours/day per team member)](https://fathom.video/share/CFEKq3G2Mz5rCnhMtG6kwWjex24nC8m4?tab=summary&timestamp=1248.0)
  - [Typical commitment: $30-40k/month, 30-day cancellation policy](https://fathom.video/share/CFEKq3G2Mz5rCnhMtG6kwWjex24nC8m4?tab=summary&timestamp=1248.0)
  - [Flexible scaling of team size based on project needs](https://fathom.video/share/CFEKq3G2Mz5rCnhMtG6kwWjex24nC8m4?tab=summary&timestamp=1255.0)

### Technical Stack and Capabilities

  - [Prefer Next.js for flexibility, speed, and SEO control](https://fathom.video/share/CFEKq3G2Mz5rCnhMtG6kwWjex24nC8m4?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [Extensive experience with branding, website design, and event materials (e.g., Small Data Event for MotherDuck)](https://fathom.video/share/CFEKq3G2Mz5rCnhMtG6kwWjex24nC8m4?tab=summary&timestamp=1329.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jason to confirm deadline for immediate website updates](https://fathom.video/share/CFEKq3G2Mz5rCnhMtG6kwWjex24nC8m4?tab=summary&timestamp=931.0)
  - [Litebox to send detailed information on retainer model and collaboration process](https://fathom.video/share/CFEKq3G2Mz5rCnhMtG6kwWjex24nC8m4?tab=summary&timestamp=1864.0)
  - [Jason to discuss previous project handoff concerns with Daniel (CTO)](https://fathom.video/share/CFEKq3G2Mz5rCnhMtG6kwWjex24nC8m4?tab=summary&timestamp=1830.0)
  - [Explore possibility of a demo project to test working relationship](https://fathom.video/share/CFEKq3G2Mz5rCnhMtG6kwWjex24nC8m4?tab=summary&timestamp=1904.0)
  - [Jason to decide on moving forward with short-term project and potential long-term collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/CFEKq3G2Mz5rCnhMtG6kwWjex24nC8m4?tab=summary&timestamp=1995.0)
